title: tectaria manilensis
intro: Tectaria manilensis is a species of fern native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, classified under the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Tectaria manilensis has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a versatile addition to traditional remedies.
